testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Candidates who analyze business requirements and translate them into fully realized business processes and solutions that implement industry-recommended practices
recommended_experience: Fundamental understanding of accounting principles and financial operations as they relate to core tasks in the finance and operations apps, manufacturing, retail, and supply chain management operations

prerequisites.description: Fundamental understanding of accounting principles and financial operations as they relate to core tasks in the finance and operations apps, manufacturing, retail, and supply chain management operations

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

objectives.title: Design and configure the chart of accounts
sub_objectives: Design and configure financial dimensions

Configure and manage account structures and advanced rules
Design and configure financial tags
Configure ledgers and currencies
Configure currency exchange types and rates

objectives.title: Implement and manage journals
sub_objectives: Configure journal names and vouchers

Create templates to edit journals in Microsoft Excel

sub_objectives: Create and manage bank groups and bank accounts

objectives.title: Configure, collect, and report taxes
sub_objectives: Configure tax groups, tax codes, settlement periods, and authorities

objectives.title: Implement cost management
sub_objectives: Configure cost groups
Configure inventory costing versions
Differentiate between inventory costing methodologies

Configure item groups and inventory posting profiles

domains.name: Implement accounts receivable, credit, collections, and subscription billing

Manage customer holds
Configure customer posting profiles
Process customer payments
Configure customer change approvals

Configure and use billing classification
Configure batch processing of free text and sales order invoicing

Manage delinquent customers
Prepare and send customer account statements
Configure and process collection letters
Configure aging definitions and process aged balances

domains.name: Implement and manage accounts payable and expenses
